As a valued Exploria Resorts Owner, you’re invited to enjoy a 4-day, 3-night getaway at the stunning Grand Seas in Daytona Beach - just pay a $99 refundable deposit to claim your stay!
CLAIM YOUR GETAWAY
GIVE FEEDBACK,
GET A GETAWAY
Why are we giving select owners a complimentary getaway?
We’ve been busy renovating and upgrading the experience at Grand Seas, and we’re offering select owners a vacation on us in exchange for your valuable feedback.
OWNER INSIGHTS DRIVE EXPLORIA’S INNOVATION.
As an Exploria Resorts Owner, we’re requesting your valued feedback to help us grow in the right direction. We’ve been busy renovating and have big future plans. Your owner input is essential.
CLAIM YOUR GETAWAY
OWNER FEEDBACK GETAWAY
✓
Give Owner Feedback, Receive a Complimentary 4-Day/3-Night Getaway at Grand Seas in Daytona Beach!
+
As a special thank you, we're also including a bonus 7-Night Condo Stay at your choice of more than 50 beautiful resorts in the US, Mexico, Caribbean and Canada*
This is your chance to re-experience the magic of Daytona Beach and discover how your Exploria Ownership can be more flexible and rewarding.
Have questions, or ready to claim your complimentary Owner Getaway now? Call (386) 262-1090.
Prefer to book online? Click here to learn more.
*7-Night Condominium Vacation: Full details and complete terms and conditions for redemption are printed on the promotional certificate. This promotional offer is not free; deposits, government taxes, carrier fees (if applicable) and agency-imposed fees are not included. Fulfillment is the sole obligation of Customer Service Network Group ("CSNG"), which is not affiliated with Exploria Resorts.
THIS ADVERTISING MATERIAL IS BEING USED FOR THE PURPOSE OF SOLICITING SALES OF A VACATION OWNERSHIP PLAN.
THE COMPLETE OFFERING TERMS ARE CONTAINED IN A PUBLIC OFFERING PLAN AVAILABLE FROM THE SPONSOR.
The vacation package being offered is provided by Club Exploria, LLC, the developer and seller of Club Exploria, a multi-site timeshare plan. © 2026 Club Exploria, LLC. All rights reserved.
